item.title: About
item.description:
I am from Romania, but have been studying in the UK since 2019 (Year 12), when I received an HMC scholarship at the Royal Masonic School for Girls in Rickmansworth, Hertfordshire.

I did my undergraduate and integrated master’s at the University of Cambridge. I was a member of Peterhouse.

Outside of maths, I dedicate most of my free time to scouting (see CUSAGC and SSAGO), as well as hiking, crochet, and too many other temporary hobbies.

item.title: Maths
item.description:
Pre-prints

  1. “Hénon maps with many rational periodic points” (with H Kim, H Krieger, and V Szeto)

Talks

  1. “An Introduction to Mean Curvature Flow” (Queen Mary Internal Postgraduate Seminar, October 2025)
  2. “Otto Calculus and Gradient Flows on the Manifold of Probability Measures” (Tomorrow’s Mathematicians Today Conference, March 2025)
  3. “An Introduction to Mean Curvature Flow” (Part III Seminar Series, December 2024)
  4. “Otto Calculus and Gradient Flows on the Infinite-Dimensional Manifold of Probability Measures” (Summer Research Festival, October 2024) - slides here
  5. “The X-Ray Transform and Geometric Inverse Problems” (Archimedeans, June 2024) - slides here
  6. “Polynomials with many Rational Preperiodic Points” (CMP Presentation Day, August 2023) - slides here

Part III Essay

As part of my MMath, I wrote an essay titled “Manifolds with Non-Negative Scalar Curvature”, under the supervision of Paul Minter. A copy of this can be found here.

item.title: Travels
item.description:
Future academic travel

  1. ICMS Winter School: PDE in Geometry and Analysis - 6th-9th January 2026, Edinburgh

Past academic travel

  1. British Isles Graduate Workshop VI - 1st-5th September 2025, Isle of Wight

The Needles, Isle of Wight, September 2025

item.title: Useful Links
item.description:
Below are various links with useful information about seminars, conferences and the likes. These are catered to my own interests, but anyone interested in geometric analysis and/or based in London might find them useful.

This is in no way exhaustative, so if you have a relevant link which I have not included, do let me know!

Seminars

Weekly

  1. QMUL Geometry, Analysis and Gravitation - Tuesdays 14:00-15:30, QMUL
  2. KCL Geometry - Tuesdays 15:00-16:30, S5.20, Strand Building, KCL
  3. UCL Geometry and Topology - Wednesdays 14:00-15:00, Room 706, UCL Mathematics
  4. KCL Analysis - Thursdays 11:30-12:30, S5.20, Strand Building, KCL
  5. London Analysis and Probability - Thursdays, 15:00-16:00 and 16:30-17:30, Room 500, UCL Mathematics
  6. London Geometry and Topology - Fridays, 12:45-13:45 or 13:30-14:30, Huxley 130, Imperial

Special

  1. Paris-London Analysis Seminar
  2. Brussels-London Geometry Seminar

Conference search

  1. Calculus of Variations and Geometric Measure Theory
